title: OpenAI explicit tool list baseline for the shared task catalog

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Edit a file by replacing an exact string.

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show the git working tree status.

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search file contents with a regex.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the workspace.

tools.name: shell
tools.description: Run a shell command in the workspace.
